instructions.title: Category
instructions.description: To select the category from which the asset belongs from the pre-defined menu

instructions.title: Sub category
instructions.description: To select the sub-category from which the asset belongs from the pre-defined menu

instructions.title: Asset type
instructions.description: To select the asset type from which the asset belongs from the pre-defined menu

instructions.title: Asset
instructions.description: To register the asset name, if it is available the ID of the asset please include

instructions.title: Vulnerability
instructions.description: To identify and list the vulnerabilities of the asset (weakness of an asset or control that can be exploited by one or more threats)

instructions.title: Threats
instructions.description: To select threats from the pre-defined threat catalog (potential cause of an unwanted incident, which can result in harm to a system or organization). Please note: Directly relevant threats shall be selected

instructions.title: Confidentiality (C)
instructions.description: Automatically fulfilled depending on the threat selected

instructions.title: Integrity (I)
instructions.description: Automatically fulfilled depending on the threat selected

instructions.title: Availability (A)
instructions.description: Automatically fulfilled depending on the threat selected

instructions.title: Risk impact description
instructions.description: To describe the risk

instructions.title: Impact
instructions.description: To select the impact of the risk from the pre-defined menu and using Section Risk Categories of this file to understand the impact levels meaning

instructions.title: Likelihood
instructions.description: To select the likelihood of the risk from the pre-defined menu and using Section Risk Categories of this file to understand the likelihood levels meaning

instructions.title: Risk category
instructions.description: Automatically calculated depending on the impact and likelihood levels selected

instructions.title: Existing controls
instructions.description: To list the existing controls if applicable. If there are no controls in place, indicate "No controls in place"

instructions.title: Risk treatment option
instructions.description: To select the risk treatment option from the pre-defined catalog

instructions.title: Treatment plan
instructions.description: To list the actions to mitigate the risk that are part of the treatment plan (use different rows for each action)

instructions.title: Owner
instructions.description: To register the owner of the actions

instructions.title: Due date
instructions.description: To register the due date of the actions

instructions.title: Status
instructions.description: To select the status of the actions from the pre-defined catalog

instructions.title: Residual risk
instructions.description: After the implementation of the treatment plan, to re-evaluate the risk and select a new residual risk category
